message:
fix(tests): relax interference scaling threshold from 5x to 10x in lifecycle perf test

Increase the super-linear interference detection ceiling from 5.0 to 10.0
in interference_scaling_by_count to reduce flaky failures on environments
with higher scheduling jitter or resource contention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
